title: fragaria anserina
intro: Fragaria anserina, also known as wild strawberry or meadow strawberry, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant is also known for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Fragaria anserina can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
